proof_trace: Caller allocation_get_new_ch_info does not NULL-check return value of allocation_add_permission before dereferencing (lines 332, 334). allocation_add_permission can return NULL due to malloc/realloc failure.
attack_scenario: Attacker sends repeated STUN ChannelBind requests causing memory exhaustion; malloc fails returning NULL, leading to NULL pointer dereference.
reason: allocation_add_permission NULL返却時にallocation_get_new_ch_infoがNULLチェックなしで参照。Opus/Sonnet 4レビューで発火確認済み(ACCESS VIOLATION)。GT外の新発見。PR #1841提出後、最新版で既に修正済みと判明し自分で取り下げ(CLOSED)。分析対象コミットではバグ実在。

proof_trace: get_string_list_header calls string_hash(key) which dereferences key without NULL check. When key is NULL, string_hash performs NULL pointer dereference at line 1039 (*str++). Callers ur_string_map_put/get/del do not validate key before passing.
attack_scenario: Attacker can trigger crash via TURN authentication with empty username field, causing NULL pointer dereference in string_hash leading to denial of service.
reason: get_string_list_header NULL key — not in GT; internal function with controlled inputs

proof_trace: After `_multiCall(calls)` executes at L109, there is no mechanism to reset token allowances granted to addresses other than `s_auction`. The only post-multiCall approval action (L111) sets `assetOut` allowance for `msg.sender` (the auction), leaving any approvals to arbitrary spenders set during `_multiCall` persistent. This allows `AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE` to include `token.approve(attacker, MAX_UINT)` calls in the solution, creating a persistent allowance that bypasses the `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` restriction on `withdraw()`.
attack_scenario: `AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE` includes `Call(token, abi.encodeWithSelector(IERC20.approve.selector, attacker, type(uint256).max))` in the `solution` passed to `bid()`; after `auctionCallback` completes the approval persists, allowing the attacker to call `token.transferFrom(AuctionBidder, attacker, balance)` and drain the contract's holdings in a follow-up transaction.
reason: Cross-project data contamination — AuctionBidder.sol unrelated to target

proof_trace: Property fails because realloc at line 623 can return NULL; line 624 dereferences slh->extra_list without NULL check, causing undefined behavior. No guard ensures non-NULL pointer before array access.
attack_scenario: Memory exhaustion leads to realloc failure, causing NULL pointer dereference and crash (DoS).
reason: Matches RA-N3-N1 — realloc failure in addr_list_add
